name: Axel
description: Axel, the "Flurry of Dancing Flames", is the eighth member of Organization XIII. Considered a wild card by the rest of the Organization, he acted as a double agent in Castle Oblivion, keeping track of Marluxia's plans, then betrayed the Organization for his friendship with Roxas. His distinguishing features include his spiky fire red hair, peridot eyes, and his twin purple reverse teardrop shaped markings under each eye (one per eye). He is voiced by Quinton Flynn in English and by Keiji Fujiwar

name: Cobra
description: Cobra is a member of the Oración Seis, a dark guild composed of highly powerful mages. He, along with the other Oración Seis, seek to find Nirvana, a destructive magic power that was sealed long ago. Cobra is accompanied by a huge snake, Cuberios, whom he considers to be his only friend. ~!He is a poison dragon slayer, because he injected lachryma in his body. In fact, he did it in order to be able to talk to Cuberios.!~

name: Cyno
description: A young man from Sumeru, affiliated with Sumeru Akademiya. As the General Mahamatra, Cyno leads the Matra and strikes fear into the hearts of researchers of the Sumeru Akademiya.

name: Eugene Lionhart
description: Eugene Lionheart is the titular protagonist of the web novel Damn Reincarnation. In his previous life, he was known as Hamel Dynas, and was one of the Five Great Heroes who vanquished three of the five Demon Kings of the Devildom of Helmuth long ago. After dying in the castle of the Demon King of Incarceration, he found himself reborn 300 years later as a distant relative of his comrade, Vermouth Lionheart. name: Sang-U Chu
description: Chu Sang Woo (Korean: 추상우; Japanese: 朱ソウ) is the main character of Semantic Error. Chu attends Hankuk University and is currently studying in the Department of Computer Science. He is referred to as a genius who consistently ranks at the top of his department. Because of his highly introverted nature, he does not participate in social activities. His personality is logical and meticulous, which is how he approaches most situations.
